text.title: NeMo Guardrails Worked Example
text.summary: Support bot with greet + order status + refund + jailbreak refusal.

example.note: `config/rails/customer_support.co` plus matching `actions.py`. Hits all five rules from 01-core-rules.
example.code:
define user greet "hello" "hi" "good morning"
define user ask about order status "where is my order" "what's the status of order 12345" "track my package"
define bot greet "Hello! I'm the support bot. How can I help with your order?"
define flow customer_support user greet bot greet
when user ask about order status bot ask for order number user provide order number $order = execute lookup_order(order_number=$user_input) bot provide order status using $order
when user ask about refund bot explain refund policy user confirm refund request $refund = execute process_refund(order_id=$order.id) bot confirm refund using $refund
when user say goodbye bot say goodbye

example.note: Same scenario, but `check facts` rail missing AND `lookup_order` action is sync. Hallucinations on KB-required answers; throughput collapses under load.
example.code: rails: input: flows: - check jailbreak output: {} # missing — bot answers ungrounded
